techniques.name: Hand Physiology Authentication
techniques.description: Biometric authentication technique that extracts features from low-resolution images of the hand using a Radon transform. The technique is designed to be peg-free and position invariant, making it more practical.
sources: @inproceedings{mostayedBiometricAuthenticationLow2009,  title = {Biometric Authentication from Low Resolution Hand Images Using Radon Transform},  booktitle = {2009 12th {{International Conference}} on {{Computers}} and {{Information Technology}}},  author = {Mostayed, Ahmed and Kabir, Md. Ekramul and Khan, Saurav Zaman and Mazumder, Md. Mynuddin Gani},  year = {2009},  month = dec,  pages = {587--592},  doi = {10.1109/ICCIT.2009.5407305}}
